title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, or perhaps in any other country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip restrict your access. You've got a valuable digital product to sell, but these platforms won't let you take payments. Now what? You can't afford to lose sales or waste time setting up workarounds. You need a reliable, global infrastructure that lets you sell directly to your customers. The good news is that such infrastructure exists, and it's called the Core Shop Engine from Unchained Commerce.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are limited by their own geographic restrictions and KYC requirements. They often exclude entire countries or restrict access based on a buyer's location. As a result, they can't deliver on their promise of global commerce. In contrast, the Core Shop Engine operates independently, without any restrictions or limitations. It lets you sell your digital products directly to your customers, no matter where they're from. With no payment processor account required, you can focus on growing your business, not navigating complex payment systems.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often use complex workarounds to handle restricted countries, but these solutions rarely work as promised. They might require additional setup, ongoing maintenance, or manual intervention, which can lead to delayed payments, lost sales, and frustrated customers. The Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, is designed to handle restricted countries seamlessly. Its automated delivery and payment verification processes ensure that your customers receive their digital products immediately, without any hassle or delay.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip charge various fees, sometimes without explaining them clearly. These fees can eat into your profits, making it harder to run a sustainable business. The Core Shop Engine, by contrast, is transparent about its costs. You pay a one-time fee of $49.99 for the Core Shop Engine, and that's it – no ongoing fees, no hidden costs. You keep 100% of your sales, without any deductions or markups.
The Core Shop Engine operates in 300+ coins, without any restrictions or limitations.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often require manual intervention to deliver digital products. This can lead to delays, mistakes, and frustrated customers. The Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, automates the entire delivery process. Its bot engine ensures that your customers receive their digital products immediately, without any hassle or delay. You can also customize the delivery process to suit your needs, using the Core Shop Engine's API and SDK.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, the Core Shop Engine is your best bet. Its automated delivery and payment verification processes ensure that your customers receive their digital products immediately, without any hassle or delay. You can also customize the delivery process to suit your needs, using the Core Shop Engine's API and SDK. With its transparent costs and no ongoing fees, the Core Shop Engine is the ultimate solution for global digital commerce.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
You can sell your digital products directly to your customers, without any hassle or delay.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're searching for a PayPal alternative for Nigeria digital sellers or a way to sell digital products without a Stripe account, the Core Shop Engine is your solution. It's a global infrastructure that lets you sell directly to your customers, without any restrictions or limitations. Try the Core Shop Engine today and start selling your digital products to a global audience. Visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with the Core Shop Engine, follow these steps: Install the Core Shop Engine on your website or platform. Set up your payment methods and configure your delivery options. Test your payment and delivery processes to ensure they work smoothly. Launch your digital product sales and start earning revenue. Monitor your sales analytics and adjust your strategy as needed.
The Core Shop Engine is the ultimate solution for global digital commerce, with transparent costs and no ongoing fees.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
